message:
fix: extract isCloseEvent method and rewrite test to call it (gt-7xh0y)

TestIsCloseEvent was manually checking struct fields instead of calling
an actual function, so the test would pass regardless of implementation
correctness. Extracted isCloseEvent() method on bdActivityEvent and
rewrote the test as a table-driven test that calls the real method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
